summary.en: AI-native finance platform for businesses in the Middle East.
summary.zh: 為中東企業打造的 AI 原生財務平台。

highlight.en: Combines corporate cards, a business bank account, international transfers, expense management, and accounting automation in one intelligent platform.
highlight.zh: 將企業卡、商業銀行帳戶、跨國轉帳、費用管理與會計自動化整合於單一智慧平台。

summary.en: AI-native solution for staying compliant with US sales tax and global VAT.
summary.zh: 協助企業遵循美國銷售稅與全球加值稅規範的 AI 原生解決方案。

highlight.en: An end-to-end platform handling registrations, filings, calculations, and compliance across more than 70 countries and tens of thousands of jurisdictions.
highlight.zh: 端對端平台處理稅務註冊、申報、計算與持續合規,涵蓋超過 70 個國家與數萬個司法管轄區。

summary.en: A customer support platform built specifically for B2B companies.
summary.zh: 專為 B2B 企業打造的客戶支援平台。

highlight.en: A modern alternative to Zendesk and Intercom that tracks support issues across B2B channels like Slack Connect, Microsoft Teams, email, and in-app chat.
highlight.zh: 作為 Zendesk 與 Intercom 的現代替代方案,可跨 Slack Connect、Microsoft Teams、電子郵件與應用內聊天等 B2B 管道追蹤支援問題。

summary.en: AI-powered sales agent for service-based industries.
summary.zh: 為服務型產業打造的 AI 驅動銷售代理。

highlight.en: Specializes in voice and can close customers across every channel 24/7.
highlight.zh: 專精於語音,可全天候跨所有管道成交客戶。

summary.en: AI platform that automates securities compliance for financial firms.
summary.zh: 為金融公司自動化證券合規流程的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Lets regulated financial firms of all sizes consolidate and automate compliance in one platform, today securing compliance across $3T+ in assets.
highlight.zh: 讓各種規模的受監管金融公司在單一平台整合並自動化合規流程,目前為旗下客戶逾 3 兆美元的管理資產確保合規。

summary.en: A managed marketplace for residential solar in Latin America.
summary.zh: 拉丁美洲住宅太陽能的代管市集。

highlight.en: Digitalizes the whole process of going solar with no-money-down installations and free instant quotes that require only an address.
highlight.zh: 將安裝太陽能的整個流程數位化,提供零頭期款安裝,只需地址即可取得免費即時報價。

summary.en: AI that prepares corporate R&D tax credits.
summary.zh: 運用 AI 準備企業研發稅額抵免。

highlight.en: Aims to make the notoriously complex, heavily audited US R&D tax credit fast and accurate enough that anyone can prepare a high-quality study.
highlight.zh: 目標是讓出了名複雜且高度受查核的美國研發稅額抵免變得快速且精確,使任何人都能完成高品質的研究。

summary.en: Unified platform for secrets, certificates, and privileged access management.
summary.zh: 整合密鑰、憑證與特權存取管理的統一平台。

highlight.en: Injects secrets into dev workflows, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud infrastructure, with versioning, point-in-time recovery, audit logging, and auto rotation.
highlight.zh: 將密鑰注入開發流程、CI/CD 管線與雲端基礎設施,具備版本控制、時間點還原、稽核日誌與自動輪替功能。

summary.en: Medical language models that automate healthcare operations.
summary.zh: 自動化醫療營運作業的醫療語言模型。

highlight.en: Its flagship product streamlines authorizations for life-saving drugs by analyzing EHR records and surfacing the most relevant data for large US health systems.
highlight.zh: 其旗艦產品透過分析電子病歷並呈現最相關的資料,為美國大型醫療系統簡化救命藥物的授權流程。

summary.en: Salesforce-like tooling for selling on AWS, Azure, and GCP cloud marketplaces.
summary.zh: 在 AWS、Azure 與 GCP 雲端市集上銷售的類 Salesforce 工具。

highlight.en: Removes the upfront technical investment needed to navigate cloud marketplaces, which give software sellers access to cloud budgets and make procurement faster.
highlight.zh: 省去進入雲端市集所需的前期技術投資;這些市集讓軟體賣家觸及客戶的雲端預算,並加速採購流程。

summary.en: AI-native employee management platform for high-growth companies.
summary.zh: 為高成長公司打造的 AI 原生員工管理平台。

highlight.en: Has raised $85M from Battery Ventures and Peak XV, and is backed by founders and operators behind companies like Shopify, Stripe, Dropbox, and Coinbase.
highlight.zh: 已向 Battery Ventures 與 Peak XV 募得 8,500 萬美元,並獲 Shopify、Stripe、Dropbox 與 Coinbase 等公司的創辦人與營運者支持。

summary.en: An email API for developers to build, test, and send transactional emails at scale.
summary.zh: 供開發者大規模建構、測試與寄送交易型電子郵件的電子郵件 API。

highlight.en: Positioned as a modern alternative for teams currently using Sendgrid, AWS SES, or Postmark.
highlight.zh: 定位為目前使用 Sendgrid、AWS SES 或 Postmark 團隊的現代替代方案。

summary.en: A system of record for design detail management in architecture and engineering.
summary.zh: 建築與工程業設計細節管理的記錄系統。

highlight.en: Helps AECO professionals streamline detail management, reduce errors, and speed up delivery in a $12T+ industry long underserved by technology.
highlight.zh: 協助建築、工程、營造與業主專業人士簡化細節管理、減少錯誤並加速交付,服務一個逾 12 兆美元、長期缺乏技術支援的產業。

summary.en: AI-based full-stack cloud observability platform.
summary.zh: 以 AI 為基礎的全端雲端可觀測性平台。

highlight.en: Unifies metrics, logs, traces, and events on a single timeline with single-command installation, AI-based anomaly detection, and GPT-4-based error resolution.
highlight.zh: 以單一指令安裝,將指標、日誌、追蹤與事件統一於同一時間軸,並提供 AI 異常偵測與基於 GPT-4 的錯誤解決功能。

summary.en: AI workflow automation for auto lenders' servicing operations.
summary.zh: 為汽車貸款機構的服務作業提供 AI 工作流程自動化。

highlight.en: An AI servicing tool already working with the largest auto lenders in America.
highlight.zh: 一款 AI 服務工具,已與美國最大的汽車貸款機構合作。

summary.en: Platform that empowers autism care providers to go independent.
summary.zh: 協助自閉症照護提供者自立門戶的平台。

highlight.en: Provides everything providers need to run independently, from scheduling and billing to marketing and client support.
highlight.zh: 提供照護者獨立經營所需的一切,從排程、計費到行銷與客戶支援。

summary.en: Dollar banking for people in Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲民眾提供的美元銀行服務。

highlight.en: A neobank tackling currency devaluation with US-dollar savings accounts, a Mastercard debit card, and dollar-denominated investing options.
highlight.zh: 一家對抗貨幣貶值的新型網路銀行,提供美元儲蓄帳戶、Mastercard 簽帳卡與美元計價的投資選項。

summary.en: A finance control centre for African businesses.
summary.zh: 為非洲企業打造的財務控制中心。

highlight.en: Lets businesses control spending, process payments, manage payroll, and run multi-currency operations with approval workflows from one unified platform.
highlight.zh: 讓企業在單一統一平台上,透過審批流程控管支出、處理付款、管理薪資並進行多幣別營運。

summary.en: AI-powered virtual care for seniors with chronic disease.
summary.zh: 為患有慢性病的長者提供 AI 驅動的虛擬照護。

highlight.en: Starts with lung disease, helping health plans reduce costs by keeping members healthy and out of the hospital.
highlight.zh: 以肺部疾病為起點,協助健康保險計畫透過讓會員保持健康、避免住院來降低成本。

summary.en: A Voice AI company making voice technology accessible and useful for all.
summary.zh: 致力讓語音技術人人可用且實用的語音 AI 公司。

highlight.en: Builds conversational voice models that can clone any voice or accent and generate speech in real time.
highlight.zh: 打造能複製任何聲音或口音並即時生成語音的對話式語音模型。

summary.en: Automating personal injury legal work for law firms.
summary.zh: 為律師事務所自動化人身傷害法律工作。

highlight.en: Strengthens client engagement with real-time case status tracking, AI-powered communication, and document upload, integrating with case management systems.
highlight.zh: 以即時案件狀態追蹤、AI 驅動溝通與文件上傳強化客戶互動,並與事務所現有的案件管理系統整合。

summary.en: Automate data-driven slide decks and documents with AI.
summary.zh: 運用 AI 自動化以數據驅動的簡報與文件。

highlight.en: Fully automates the preparation of recurring data reports for organizations including SoFi, Zillow, and Whirlpool, and is backed by Insight Partners.
highlight.zh: 為 SoFi、Zillow 與 Whirlpool 等組織全面自動化定期數據報告的製作,並獲 Insight Partners 支持。

summary.en: An AI agent that automates manual tasks in logistics.
summary.zh: 自動化物流人工任務的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Founded by a former founding engineer on Kodiak Robotics' self-driving trucks and a CEO who scaled a logistics software company from $2M to $20M+.
highlight.zh: 由曾任 Kodiak Robotics 自駕卡車創始工程師,以及一位將物流軟體公司從 200 萬美元擴展至逾 2,000 萬美元的執行長共同創辦。

summary.en: AI-powered digital staff accountant for accounting operations.
summary.zh: 為會計作業打造的 AI 驅動數位職員會計師。

highlight.en: Automates data categorization, document collection, and client follow-up; trusted by 100+ customers including firms EisnerAmper and Frank Rimerman.
highlight.zh: 自動化資料分類、文件蒐集與客戶追蹤,獲逾 100 家客戶信任,包括 EisnerAmper 與 Frank Rimerman 等會計師事務所。

summary.en: Risk-free wholesale marketplace for retailers across Southeast Asia.
summary.zh: 為東南亞零售商打造的無風險批發市集。

highlight.en: A one-stop B2B marketplace that streamlines buying so independent retailers can source top-selling products from unique brands.
highlight.zh: 一站式 B2B 市集,簡化採購流程,讓獨立零售商能向特色品牌進貨暢銷商品。

summary.en: Instantly generate SDKs and API documentation for companies.
summary.zh: 為企業即時產生 SDK 與 API 文件。

highlight.en: Trusted by 200+ customers including Square, Webflow, ElevenLabs, and Intercom to power developer and agent experiences, and is building open source.
highlight.zh: 獲 Square、Webflow、ElevenLabs 與 Intercom 等逾 200 家客戶信任,用以支撐開發者與代理體驗,並以開源方式打造。

summary.en: AI-driven offensive security for outnumbered security teams.
summary.zh: 為人力吃緊的資安團隊提供 AI 驅動的攻擊性資安服務。

highlight.en: Replaces legacy scanners and manual processes with AI agents that discover, test, and remediate directly in engineering workflows.
highlight.zh: 以能在工程流程中直接發現、測試與修補的 AI 代理,取代傳統掃描器與人工流程。

summary.en: Transforming how health systems optimize their labor.
summary.zh: 改變醫療系統優化人力的方式。

highlight.en: Tackles staffing and scheduling first, helping hospitals cut labor spend, improve efficiency, and free clinical leaders from hours of daily work.
highlight.zh: 首先聚焦人力配置與排班,協助醫院削減人力支出、提升效率,並讓臨床主管擺脫每日數小時的工作負擔。

summary.en: B2B payments platform for emerging markets.
summary.zh: 為新興市場打造的 B2B 支付平台。

highlight.en: Makes it easy and affordable for businesses without USD access to meet global payment obligations and manage treasury and liquidity needs.
highlight.zh: 讓無法取得美元的企業能輕鬆且實惠地履行跨國付款義務,並管理資金調度與流動性需求。

summary.en: An AI support agent for ecommerce customer service.
summary.zh: 用於電商客戶服務的 AI 支援代理。

highlight.en: Integrates with help desks like Zendesk and Gorgias and lets top Shopify brands automate up to 80% of their support tickets fully autonomously.
highlight.zh: 與 Zendesk、Gorgias 等服務台整合,讓頂尖 Shopify 品牌可全自動處理多達 80% 的支援工單。

summary.en: AI-native platform for government contractors.
summary.zh: 為政府承包商打造的 AI 原生平台。

highlight.en: Built to help public sector teams find, win, and manage work.
highlight.zh: 專為協助公部門團隊尋找、贏得並管理業務而打造。

summary.en: An actionable FinOps platform for controlling multi-cloud spend.
summary.zh: 用於控管多雲支出的可執行 FinOps 平台。

highlight.en: Keeps multi-cloud spend under control 24/7 using AI agents.
highlight.zh: 運用 AI 代理全天候控管多雲支出。

summary.en: Production-ready document processing with high accuracy.
summary.zh: 可投入生產且高精度的文件處理服務。

highlight.en: Parses, extracts, and splits difficult documents of any layout using specialized vision models to ship reliable pipelines in minutes.
highlight.zh: 運用專用視覺模型解析、擷取並拆分任何版面的高難度文件,於數分鐘內建立可靠的處理管線。

summary.en: Create beautiful product videos and docs in minutes.
summary.zh: 於數分鐘內製作精美的產品影片與文件。

highlight.en: Its AI turns simple screen recordings into studio-quality instructional videos and step-by-step docs for customer onboarding and employee training.
highlight.zh: 其 AI 將簡單的螢幕錄影轉換為工作室品質的教學影片與逐步文件,適用於客戶導入與員工訓練。

summary.en: A B2B marketplace for steel and metal raw materials in Indonesia.
summary.zh: 印尼鋼鐵與金屬原料的 B2B 市集。

highlight.en: Lets small and medium manufacturers order domestic and imported raw materials at lower prices, with no minimum order quantities and real-time inventory.
highlight.zh: 讓中小型製造商以更低價格訂購國產與進口原料,無最低訂購量限制並提供即時庫存。

summary.en: Vellum is a developer platform for building production LLM applications.
summary.zh: Vellum 是一個用於打造生產級 LLM 應用程式的開發者平台。

highlight.en: A toolset focused on helping teams develop, evaluate, and ship large language model features reliably.
highlight.zh: 一套工具組,專注於協助團隊可靠地開發、評估並推出大型語言模型功能。

summary.en: An AI-driven operating system for fundraising.
summary.zh: 為募資打造的 AI 驅動作業系統。

highlight.en: Backed by a16z and YC, it brings proprietary intelligence on the venture ecosystem so founders can identify the most likely investors and warm introductions.
highlight.zh: 獲 a16z 與 YC 支持,提供創投生態系的專有情報,讓創辦人能找出最可能的投資人與引薦人脈。

summary.en: Billing automation built for B2B startups.
summary.zh: 為 B2B 新創打造的計費自動化。

highlight.en: Extracts billing logic directly from contracts in PDFs or a CRM to auto-generate accurate invoices, integrating with Stripe, DocuSign, HubSpot, and Salesforce.
highlight.zh: 直接從 PDF 或 CRM 中的合約擷取計費邏輯,自動產生精確發票,並與 Stripe、DocuSign、HubSpot 和 Salesforce 整合。

summary.en: Open-source framework for training AI on distributed data.
summary.zh: 用於在分散式資料上訓練 AI 的開源框架。

highlight.en: The most popular open-source federated learning ecosystem, trusted by Mozilla, Samsung, and Bosch to improve AI on sensitive, securely distributed data.
highlight.zh: 最受歡迎的開源聯邦學習生態系,獲 Mozilla、Samsung 與 Bosch 信任,用以在安全分散的敏感資料上改進 AI 模型。

summary.en: A suite of AI sales employees including an AI SDR.
summary.zh: 一套 AI 銷售員工方案,包含 AI 業務開發代表。

highlight.en: Its flagship AI SDR Alisha autonomously runs ICP research, prospecting, personalized outreach, and call booking, built on the proprietary ThorV2 model.
highlight.zh: 其旗艦 AI SDR Alisha 可自主執行理想客戶輪廓研究、開發名單、個人化外聯與安排通話,並建構於專有的 ThorV2 函式呼叫模型之上。

summary.en: An AI-powered super mentor for test preparation.
summary.zh: 為考試準備打造的 AI 驅動超級導師。

highlight.en: Uses AI to scale personalized learning so every student can receive individual attention.
highlight.zh: 運用 AI 大規模實現個人化學習,讓每位學生都能獲得個別關注。

summary.en: B2B advertising platform for the modern internet.
summary.zh: 為現代網路打造的 B2B 廣告平台。

highlight.en: Helps marketers drive pipeline with contact-level targeting and reveals who is seeing their ads even if those people never convert.
highlight.zh: 以聯絡人層級的精準鎖定協助行銷人員推動商機,並揭露誰看過廣告,即使對方從未轉換。

summary.en: Open-source LLM engineering platform.
summary.zh: 開源的 LLM 工程平台。

highlight.en: Provides traces, evals, prompt management, and metrics to debug and improve LLM applications across the lifecycle; acquired by Clickhouse in January 2026.
highlight.zh: 提供追蹤、評估、提示管理與指標,以在整個生命週期中除錯並改進 LLM 應用程式;於 2026 年 1 月被 Clickhouse 收購。

summary.en: Restaurant and coffee shop software that actually works.
summary.zh: 真正好用的餐廳與咖啡店軟體。

highlight.en: An all-in-one ecosystem for Mexican coffee shops and restaurants, covering point of sale, inventory management, payments, and more.
highlight.zh: 為墨西哥咖啡店與餐廳打造的一站式生態系,涵蓋銷售點、庫存管理、付款等功能。

summary.en: Build AI agent teammates and automations in code or no-code.
summary.zh: 以程式或無程式碼建構 AI 代理夥伴與自動化。

highlight.en: Companies like Anthropic, Midjourney, and Postman deploy its agents at scale, with a no-code builder and developer framework offering full two-way sync.
highlight.zh: Anthropic、Midjourney 與 Postman 等公司大規模部署其代理,並提供具備完整雙向同步的無程式碼建構器與開發者框架。

summary.en: A B2B marketplace for auto dealers in Africa.
summary.zh: 為非洲汽車經銷商打造的 B2B 市集。

highlight.en: Helps car dealers find, finance, and sell more cars in Africa's $30B used-car market, aiming to power $10B in annual transactions.
highlight.zh: 協助汽車經銷商在非洲 300 億美元的二手車市場中尋車、融資並售出更多車輛,目標支撐每年 100 億美元的交易額。

summary.en: A neobank for global remote workers.
summary.zh: 為全球遠端工作者打造的新型網路銀行。

highlight.en: Offers US bank accounts, a debit card, and an investment account for buying bonds or stocks on the US stock market.
highlight.zh: 提供美國銀行帳戶、簽帳卡,以及可在美國股市買進債券或股票的投資帳戶。

summary.en: Institutional intelligence platform for private equity investors.
summary.zh: 為私募股權投資人打造的機構級情報平台。

highlight.en: Supports deal teams across the investment lifecycle from sourcing to post-close, already relied on by funds like Berkshire Partners and Clearlake Capital.
highlight.zh: 在從尋案到成交後的整個投資生命週期中支援交易團隊,已獲 Berkshire Partners 與 Clearlake Capital 等基金倚賴。

summary.en: Agentic integrations and automations for the enterprise.
summary.zh: 為企業打造的代理式整合與自動化。

highlight.en: Orchestrates custom integrations, workflows, and agents in hours, with self-healing agents that scan connected apps for endpoint or schema changes and fix them.
highlight.zh: 於數小時內編排自訂整合、工作流程與代理,並由自我修復代理掃描已連接應用程式的端點或結構變更並自動修正。

summary.en: An AI social facilitator for offline, in-person human interactions.
summary.zh: 為線下面對面人際互動打造的 AI 社交促進工具。

highlight.en: An IRL marketplace facilitating social experiences at local venues and events through AI recommendations.
highlight.zh: 一個現實生活中的市集,透過 AI 推薦在當地場地與活動中促成社交體驗。

summary.en: Enterprise-grade OpenTelemetry for distributed tracing.
summary.zh: 用於分散式追蹤的企業級 OpenTelemetry。

highlight.en: Uses eBPF technology to automatically generate distributed traces for any application without engineering work, replacing months-long manual pipeline builds.
highlight.zh: 運用 eBPF 技術為任何應用程式自動產生分散式追蹤,無需工程工作,取代耗時數月的人工管線建置。

summary.en: Real-time, account-to-account B2B-to-C payments in Colombia.
summary.zh: 哥倫比亞即時的帳戶對帳戶 B2B2C 支付。

highlight.en: A single API connected to millions of accounts lets companies make real-time payables and receivables without ACH rails, via a payment button and disbursement.
highlight.zh: 透過連接數百萬帳戶的單一 API,讓企業無需 ACH 清算即可即時收付款,並提供付款按鈕與即時撥款功能。

summary.en: Social listening built for the video era.
summary.zh: 為影音時代打造的社群聆聽工具。

highlight.en: Built by Sualab's former founders ($200M exit), it uses agentic AI to automate video marketing for large CPG brands like Tiffany and Clorox, reaching $2.1M ARR.
highlight.zh: 由 Sualab 前創辦人(2 億美元出售)打造,運用代理式 AI 為 Tiffany、Clorox 等大型消費品牌自動化影音行銷,達成 210 萬美元年經常性收入。

summary.en: Transform any software into multi-cloud SaaS in minutes.
summary.zh: 於數分鐘內將任何軟體轉為多雲 SaaS。

highlight.en: Lets you SaaS-ify a Docker image and monetize open-source software by simply importing an existing docker-compose, instead of building it yourself over years.
highlight.zh: 讓你將 Docker 映像檔 SaaS 化,只需匯入現有的 docker-compose 即可將開源軟體變現,而非耗時數年自行打造。

summary.en: A single payment platform for EV drivers and fleets.
summary.zh: 為電動車駕駛與車隊打造的單一支付平台。

highlight.en: Simplifies EV charging payment and expense management; the founders previously operated 100+ EV charging stations and worked at Zipcar, Bosch, and Mercedes.
highlight.zh: 簡化電動車充電付款與費用管理;創辦人曾營運逾 100 座電動車充電站,並任職於 Zipcar、Bosch 與 Mercedes。

summary.en: Automating healthcare revenue cycle management with an AI workforce.
summary.zh: 以 AI 人力自動化醫療收入週期管理。

highlight.en: Uses AI to prevent revenue leakage in health systems.
highlight.zh: 運用 AI 防止醫療系統的收入流失。

summary.en: An operating system for shipping and receiving operations.
summary.zh: 用於貨運與收貨作業的作業系統。

highlight.en: Systemizes planning and execution on the loading dock and in the yard with real-time visibility and automation; 100+ customers, 172% NRR, and zero churn.
highlight.zh: 系統化裝卸碼頭與堆場的規劃與執行,提供即時可視性與自動化;擁有逾 100 家客戶、172% 淨收入留存率與零流失。

summary.en: A control plane for deploying and governing enterprise AI agents.
summary.zh: 用於部署與治理企業 AI 代理的控制平面。

highlight.en: Lets enterprises build, govern, and deploy AI agents and MCP servers powered by their own data and subject to enterprise controls.
highlight.zh: 讓企業以自有資料為基礎、在企業控管之下建構、治理並部署 AI 代理與 MCP 伺服器。

summary.en: A fully agentic software engineer.
summary.zh: 全自主代理式的軟體工程師。

highlight.en: Lets you work on every ticket at once, asynchronously.
highlight.zh: 讓你能以非同步方式同時處理每一張工單。

summary.en: AI agents for fraud review and investigations.
summary.zh: 用於詐欺審查與調查的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Builds AI agents for fraud, identity, and investigations serving Fortune 500s, marketplaces, and regulated financial services.
highlight.zh: 為財星 500 大企業、市集平台與受監管金融服務打造詐欺、身分與調查的 AI 代理。

summary.en: Move money programmatically across emerging markets.
summary.zh: 在新興市場間以程式化方式轉移資金。

highlight.en: Enables fintechs, businesses, and banks to bridge stablecoins with local payment rails; CEO Ianai was on dLocal's founding team, growing it to $100M ARR.
highlight.zh: 讓金融科技公司、企業與銀行能將穩定幣與當地支付管道接軌;執行長 Ianai 曾是 dLocal 創始團隊成員,協助其從零成長至 1 億美元年經常性收入。

summary.en: Real-time ARR reporting and forecasting for SaaS companies.
summary.zh: 為 SaaS 公司提供即時 ARR 報告與預測。

highlight.en: Lets SaaS companies calculate and forecast ARR accurately in real time without spreadsheets, pulling data from tools like HubSpot and Chargebee.
highlight.zh: 讓 SaaS 公司無需試算表即可即時精確計算與預測年經常性收入,並從 HubSpot、Chargebee 等工具擷取資料。

summary.en: Workflow automation for construction finance.
summary.zh: 營造業財務的工作流程自動化。

highlight.en: Automates the thousands of invoices home builders get per project: checking costs against budgets, handling approvals, paying bills, and updating Quickbooks.
highlight.zh: 自動處理住宅建商每個專案收到的數千張發票,核對成本與預算、處理審批、支付帳單並更新 QuickBooks。

summary.en: Performance-optimized influencer marketing at scale.
summary.zh: 以效益優化、大規模執行的網紅行銷。

highlight.en: Fully automates outreach, negotiations, contracts, payments, and taxes with smart search and real-time performance tracking, saving brands over $1M annually.
highlight.zh: 全面自動化外聯、議價、合約、付款與稅務,並提供智慧搜尋與即時成效追蹤,為品牌每年省下逾 100 萬美元。

summary.en: A secure document agent for manipulating and converting files.
summary.zh: 用於處理與轉換檔案的安全文件代理。

highlight.en: Lets you manipulate and convert PDF and Word files alongside internal knowledge held in your knowledge base.
highlight.zh: 讓你能處理與轉換 PDF 和 Word 檔案,並結合知識庫中的內部知識。

summary.en: An operating system for building mission-critical enterprise apps.
summary.zh: 用於建構關鍵任務企業應用程式的作業系統。

highlight.en: Replaces a fragmented enterprise stack with one platform to build, deploy, and manage production apps, owning both the open-source framework and the platform.
highlight.zh: 以單一平台取代分散的企業技術堆疊,端對端建構、部署與管理生產級應用程式,同時掌握開源框架與其運行平台。

summary.en: Go from idea to production with AI.
summary.zh: 運用 AI 從構想直達生產。

highlight.en: An AI design tool used by 2,500+ product teams at companies like Vanta and Doordash to iterate on ideas, gather feedback, and deploy to a website.
highlight.zh: 一款 AI 設計工具,獲 Vanta、Doordash 等公司逾 2,500 個產品團隊用以反覆打磨構想、蒐集回饋並部署至網站。

summary.en: Rippling for the construction industry.
summary.zh: 營造業版的 Rippling。

highlight.en: Modern payroll, HR, and operations tools purpose-built for construction, helping companies boost profits rather than paperwork.
highlight.zh: 專為營造業打造的現代薪資、人資與營運工具,協助公司提升利潤而非文書作業。

summary.en: An API for diagnostic test analysis across COVID-19, flu, RSV, STDs and more.
summary.zh: 用於 COVID-19、流感、RSV、性病等診斷檢測分析的 API。

highlight.en: Lets medical companies convert photos of rapid diagnostic tests into results through a simple API.
highlight.zh: 讓醫療公司透過簡單的 API 將快速診斷檢測的照片轉換為結果。

summary.en: A programming language for building AI agents.
summary.zh: 用於建構 AI 代理的程式語言。

highlight.en: Builds BAML, a language with built-in tools to test, observe, and work with structured LLM outputs and tool calling natively, like 'React' for AI.
highlight.zh: 打造 BAML,一種內建工具可原生測試、觀測並處理結構化 LLM 輸出與工具呼叫的語言,堪稱 AI 界的「React」。

summary.en: Generative AI for protein design.
summary.zh: 用於蛋白質設計的生成式 AI。

highlight.en: Builds AI to engineer new, useful proteins; the team has driven breakthroughs for 7 years, including the first experimental validation of AI proteins.
highlight.zh: 打造能設計全新實用蛋白質的 AI 系統;團隊七年來一直引領蛋白質設計突破,包括首次對 AI 生成蛋白質的實驗驗證。

summary.en: Call every LLM API as if it were OpenAI, supporting 100+ LLMs.
summary.zh: 以 OpenAI 的方式呼叫所有 LLM API,支援逾 100 種 LLM。

highlight.en: An open-source LLM gateway with 18K+ GitHub stars, trusted by Rocket Money, Samsara, and Adobe to call 100+ LLM APIs in the OpenAI format.
highlight.zh: 一個擁有逾 1.8 萬 GitHub 星標的開源 LLM 閘道,獲 Rocket Money、Samsara 與 Adobe 信任,以 OpenAI 格式呼叫逾 100 種 LLM API。

summary.en: A new, opinionated git platform.
summary.zh: 一個全新、立場鮮明的 git 平台。

highlight.en: Rebuilds code hosting, code review, and CI from the metal for small, focused teams working closely and augmented by AI.
highlight.zh: 從底層重建程式碼託管、程式碼審查與 CI,專為緊密協作且由 AI 輔助的小型專注團隊打造。

summary.en: Know what your LLM is doing and why it is failing.
summary.zh: 了解你的 LLM 正在做什麼,以及它為何失敗。

highlight.en: Gives full visibility into every prompt, response, and failure to track quality, detect drift, and stop hallucinations, powered by OpenTelemetry in one line.
highlight.zh: 完整掌握每個提示、回應與失敗,以追蹤品質、偵測漂移並阻止幻覺,由 OpenTelemetry 驅動且僅需一行即可整合。

summary.en: Build and deploy fully managed AI agents and workflows.
summary.zh: 建構並部署全代管的 AI 代理與工作流程。

highlight.en: An open-source TypeScript platform for long-running tasks with retries, queues, full observability, and elastic scaling, from the founders of JSON Hero.
highlight.zh: 一個開源的 TypeScript 平台,支援具重試、佇列、完整可觀測性與彈性擴展的長時間任務,由 JSON Hero 創辦人打造。

summary.en: Design and explain complex software architecture.
summary.zh: 設計並闡釋複雜的軟體架構。

highlight.en: A collaborative diagramming tool that lets software and product teams map their systems and align on technical decisions with full context.
highlight.zh: 一款協作式繪圖工具,讓軟體與產品團隊能繪製系統地圖,並在充分脈絡下對技術決策取得共識。

summary.en: AI agents for platform and infrastructure teams.
summary.zh: 為平台與基礎設施團隊打造的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Helps engineering teams fix issues faster and cut on-call escalations by automating triage, debugging, and remediation; also builds open-source Playbooks.
highlight.zh: 透過自動化分流、除錯與修復,協助工程團隊更快解決問題並減少待命升級,並推出 Playbooks 與 Kenobi 等開源專案。

summary.en: A build acceleration platform making builds up to 40x faster.
summary.zh: 使建置速度提升至最高 40 倍的建置加速平台。

highlight.en: Speeds up Docker containers and GitHub Actions for companies like PostHog and Wistia, with remote container builds, build insights, and cheaper Actions runners.
highlight.zh: 為 PostHog、Wistia 等公司加速 Docker 容器與 GitHub Actions,提供遠端容器建置、建置洞察,以及更便宜更快的 Actions 執行器。

summary.en: AI agents for corporate real estate teams.
summary.zh: 為企業不動產團隊打造的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Replaces fragmented, manual back-office work with agents that manage and optimize portfolios; used by internal teams at enterprises like Reddit and Confluent.
highlight.zh: 以能管理並優化資產組合的代理取代分散的人工後勤工作;Reddit、Confluent 等企業的內部團隊皆有使用。

summary.en: AI and financial services for real estate in Latin America, starting with rent.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲不動產提供 AI 與金融服務,以租金為起點。

highlight.en: Building the AI-native bank for LatAm real estate, with agents for property managers and payments to own rent flow, then credit and insurance on $235B of rent.
highlight.zh: 打造拉美不動產的 AI 原生銀行,先以服務物業經理的代理與付款掌握租金流,再針對 2,350 億美元的租金流推出信貸與保險產品。

summary.en: Phone AI that captures every dealership revenue opportunity.
summary.zh: 為經銷商掌握每一個營收機會的電話 AI。

highlight.en: Human-like AI phone agents answer calls instantly, book appointments, and run outbound campaigns, integrated with CDK, Reynolds, Tekion, and other dealer tools.
highlight.zh: 擬人化 AI 電話代理可即時接聽來電、預約並執行外撥行銷,並與 CDK、Reynolds、Tekion 等經銷商工具整合。

summary.en: A TikTok-style corporate training platform.
summary.zh: TikTok 風格的企業培訓平台。

highlight.en: Achieves 10x better completion rates by training employees on topics like compliance and inclusion through short, TikTok-style content.
highlight.zh: 透過 TikTok 風格的短內容培訓員工合規與共融等主題,使完成率提升 10 倍。

summary.en: A Faire-style marketplace for LATAM's 50M+ independent sellers.
summary.zh: 為拉美逾 5,000 萬名獨立賣家打造的 Faire 風格市集。

highlight.en: Connects digital-first beauty brands to individual sellers across Brazil's ~$30B beauty market, powered by embedded microcredit, with GMV growing ~30% MoM.
highlight.zh: 在巴西約 300 億美元的美妝市場中,以嵌入式微型信貸串連數位優先的美妝品牌與個別賣家,商品交易總額每月成長約 30%。

summary.en: The SAFE for commercial contracts.
summary.zh: 商業合約版的 SAFE。

highlight.en: Offers standard, open-source contracts like NDAs and sales agreements with structured data, plus software to manage them; 63% close within 24 hours.
highlight.zh: 提供保密協議、銷售合約等具結構化資料的標準開源合約,並附帶管理軟體;63% 的合約於 24 小時內成交。

summary.en: Scale customer success and onboarding with AI.
summary.zh: 運用 AI 擴展客戶成功與導入。

highlight.en: An AI CSM that onboards, trains, and grows accounts non-stop for SaaS companies, offering white-glove onboarding at scale for a fraction of the cost.
highlight.zh: 一款 AI 客戶成功經理,為 SaaS 公司不間斷地導入、培訓並拓展客戶,以極低成本大規模提供高規格的導入體驗。

summary.en: An open-source, full-stack monitoring platform.
summary.zh: 開源的全端監控平台。

highlight.en: With a few lines of code, it lets you play back users' exact interactions to reproduce bugs and get notified of future errors and regressions on your web app.
highlight.zh: 只需幾行程式碼,即可重播使用者的確切操作以重現錯誤,並在網頁應用程式日後出現錯誤與回歸時收到通知。

summary.en: Maximize profits with AI-powered rebate management.
summary.zh: 以 AI 驅動的回扣管理來最大化利潤。

highlight.en: Replaces error-prone spreadsheets for manufacturers and distributors, tracking rebate payments and surfacing insights from financial data silos in a $1T market.
highlight.zh: 為製造商與經銷商取代易出錯的試算表,追蹤回扣付款並從財務資料孤島中挖掘洞察,所處市場每年規模達 1 兆美元。

summary.en: Infrastructure tools that help large companies customize their generative AI.
summary.zh: 協助大型公司客製化生成式 AI 的基礎設施工具。

highlight.en: Provides a sleek, interoperable layer that lets companies customize generative AI models with their existing customer and enterprise data in real time.
highlight.zh: 提供一個流暢且可互通的層,讓公司能即時運用既有的客戶與企業資料客製化生成式 AI 模型。

summary.en: A leading AI workforce for the trades.
summary.zh: 為技術工種打造的領先 AI 人力。

highlight.en: Outperforms humans at high-stakes, revenue-critical work such as sales and dispatch for the trades.
highlight.zh: 在銷售與派工等高風險、攸關營收的技術工種工作上表現勝過人力。

summary.en: Accelerate clinical trials with real-time, actionable insights.
summary.zh: 以即時、可行動的洞察加速臨床試驗。

highlight.en: A control room for clinical trials that consolidates data from multiple trial systems into real-time dashboards, helping biopharma teams speed up trials.
highlight.zh: 臨床試驗的控制室,將多個試驗系統的資料整合至即時儀表板,協助生技製藥團隊加速試驗並改善病患預後。
